text.title: Behavioral Design Patterns Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the behavioral-patterns methodology end-to-end.

step.name: locate-variance
step.action: Find the if/elif/switch or duplicated-then-renamed branches.

step.name: diagnose
step.action: Decide: variance over algorithm choice (Strategy), lifecycle stage (State), request handler chain (CoR), event-listeners (Observer), etc.
step.decision-gate: If two patterns seem to fit, escalate — wrong choice ossifies the code.

step.name: draft-refactor
step.action: Sketch the abstract + concrete classes; decide on selection mechanism (DI, factory, config).

step.name: apply-refactor
step.action: Replace the if/elif with the pattern; add tests for each concrete.

step.name: review
step.action: PR review: verify variance is removed; no new pattern misuse introduced.
